objective: PR openai/codex#31684 upstream models.json 스냅샷을 opencodex GPT-5.6 네이티브 스펙에 반영(파리티)하고, 네이티브 GPT 모델을 GUI에서 켜고 끌 수 있게 한다. WP1: 번들 실물 스펙 체크인 + catalog 합성 교체 + luna ultra 교정. WP2: disabledModels bare-slug 확장 + visibility hide 메커니즘 + /api/models native 행 + GUI 토글. 검증: tsc, bun test, GUI 렌더 관찰, SoT 문서 동기화.

tasks.title: Bundle sol/terra/luna upstream entries as checked-in data
deriveEntry/merge sync use bundled spec instead of gpt-5.5 template synthesis
Correct existing on-disk 5.6 entries (luna ultra) during sync

workPhases.title: Native GPT model on/off toggles (GUI + catalog + /v1/models)

tasks.title: disabledModels accepts bare native slugs; visibility hide/list in sync
GUI Models.tsx native group + i18n en/ko/zh
Tests + GUI render observation + docs sync

criteria.scenario: Catalog build advertises luna without ultra, sol/terra with ultra, sol default_reasoning_level low
criteria.expectedEvidence: bun test output with new catalog cases green; test names + exit 0
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun test: new case 'gpt-5.6 natives come from the pinned upstream snapshot' asserts luna [low..max] no ultra, sol/terra ultra, sol default low; 77 pass 0 fail (catalog suites); full suite 1676 pass 0 fail

criteria.scenario: Synthesized 5.6 entries carry upstream display_name/description/metadata (parity vs bundled snapshot)
criteria.expectedEvidence: parity test comparing built entries to bundled upstream fields; bun test green
criteria.capturedEvidence: same test asserts display_name GPT-5.6-Sol/Terra/Luna, descriptions, NUX, multi_agent_version v2/v2/v1, ctx 372000, minimal_client_version stripped; upgrade-vs-preserve sync test green

criteria.scenario: Full gates for WP1: tsc + full bun test + SoT docs patched
criteria.expectedEvidence: bun x tsc --noEmit exit 0; full bun test exit 0; doc diff paths
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun x tsc --noEmit exit 0; bun test 1676 pass/0 fail (22.14s); docs patched: docs/codex-app-model-catalog.md, docs-site codex-app-models.md, README en/ko/zh; commit 'catalog: pin upstream models.json snapshot (PR #31684)' 11 files +1057

criteria.scenario: Disabling a native slug hides it from on-disk catalog (visibility hide) and /v1/models; re-enable restores list
criteria.expectedEvidence: unit tests driving disable->sync->enable; assertions on visibility + /v1/models payload
criteria.capturedEvidence: tests/native-model-toggle.test.ts: 'catalog sync flips supported natives to visibility hide and restores list on re-enable' + 'visibility hide survives the upstream-upgrade branch' + 'backfilled missing natives are synthesized hidden' green; /v1/models bare list omission via visibleNativeSlugs unit test; 8/8 pass

criteria.scenario: GUI Models page renders native GPT group with working toggles
criteria.expectedEvidence: GUI build passes; screenshot observation of native toggle group recorded in devlog
criteria.capturedEvidence: GUI build (tsc -b && vite build) pass; render observation via Playwright chrome headless: native group pinned first w/ badge, gpt-5.4 pre-disabled strikethrough, luna toggle click -> aria-pressed false + server disabled:true + Applied notice; screenshot devlog/_plan/260709_pr31684_gpt56_parity/021_wp2_render_observation.png

criteria.scenario: Full gates for WP2: tsc + full bun test + docs sync + D summary in devlog unit
criteria.expectedEvidence: fresh command outputs exit 0; devlog D summary path
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun x tsc --noEmit exit 0; full bun test 1684 pass/0 fail (172 files, 22.78s); docs synced (catalog doc, structure/03, docs-site config en/ko/zh); D summary 022_wp2_d_summary.md; commit 'models: native GPT on/off toggles' 14 files +268/-27
